summary: 3/3 checks PASS (with notes). 1 bug found: mg_sang_froid mis-routed to GAMES[vigueur] instead of GAMES[esprit]. 1 architectural note: FIELD_MINIGAMES uses conceptual names for LLM/display; actual dispatch uses option[field] -> GAMES dict (two parallel systems). 1 low artifact: orphaned mg_de_du_destin.gd.uid.

checks.title: FIELD_MINIGAMES vs bible s.6.2 exact match
checks.details: All 9 entries in FIELD_MINIGAMES match bible s.6.2 table (lines 317-324) exactly. 'neutre' covered by bible line 869 (verbs neutres → esprit, minigame apaisement/volonte). No missing or extra entries.

checks.title: Minigame implementations exist (scenes/scripts)
checks.details: scenes/minigames/ does NOT exist — minigames are script-only overlays (expected architecture). All 24 mg_ scripts referenced in GAMES dict exist in scripts/minigames/. Architecture note: FIELD_MINIGAMES uses conceptual names (herboristerie, fouille, runes, equilibre, traces) that are labels for LLM/display — actual dispatch uses option['field'] -> GAMES -> mg_ scripts. Two systems serve different purposes.
checks.note: Missing conceptual names are by design — they are LLM hint labels, not code identifiers. The registry GAMES dict provides the actual implementation mapping.

checks.title: No orphaned minigame scripts
checks.details: All 23 mg_ scripts in scripts/minigames/ are referenced in GAMES dict. One low-severity artifact: mg_de_du_destin.gd.uid (orphaned uid file after S2-DEAD-FILES deleted the .gd). No functional impact.
checks.orphaned_uid: mg_de_du_destin.gd.uid — uid artifact only, .gd already deleted

bugs.title: mg_sang_froid mis-routed: GAMES[vigueur] should be GAMES[esprit]
bugs.description: Bible s.6.2 + catalogue (line 337): 'Sang-froid | esprit'. FIELD_MINIGAMES['esprit'] includes 'sang_froid'. But GAMES['vigueur'] = ['mg_combat_rituel', 'mg_sang_froid', 'mg_course'] and GAMES['esprit'] = ['mg_volonte', 'mg_apaisement', 'mg_meditation']. Result: esprit-field cards NEVER select mg_sang_froid (impossible path), vigueur cards sometimes get sang_froid (wrong mental test for physical action). Fix: move mg_sang_froid from GAMES['vigueur'] to GAMES['esprit'] in minigame_registry.gd.

bugs.title: mg_meditation in GAMES[esprit] not listed in bible s.6.2
bugs.description: Bible s.6.2 esprit catalogue: apaisement, volonte, sang_froid. mg_meditation is in GAMES['esprit'] but not in bible. If sang_froid fix is applied, esprit becomes [volonte, apaisement, sang_froid] — meditation would be dropped from dispatch. mg_meditation.gd script would become unreachable. Options: (1) keep as bonus, (2) move to perception or logique, (3) add to bible after director approval.
bugs.action: Flag for director approval — do not fix automatically

bugs.title: Orphaned uid artifact: mg_de_du_destin.gd.uid
bugs.description: S2-DEAD-FILES deleted mg_de_du_destin.gd (D20 suppressed system) but left the .uid file. No functional impact. Cleanup recommended.

architecture_notes.title: FIELD_MINIGAMES and GAMES are parallel systems with different purposes
architecture_notes.description: FIELD_MINIGAMES (merlin_constants.gd) maps fields to conceptual names (herboristerie, negociation, etc.) for LLM context/display labels stored in option['minigame']. GAMES (minigame_registry.gd) maps fields to mg_ scripts for actual dispatch via option['field'] -> MiniGameRegistry.create_minigame(field). The two systems serve different purposes and should NOT be confused. This architecture is correct but could benefit from documentation.

regressions_vs_previous.check: All 23 mg_ scripts accessible via GAMES
